raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this change request routing decision.

Source Context Analysis:
- REQ-CHG-903: Execute CHG-903 at 23:15Z on 2026-07-03
- WIN-CHG-903: Approval window 14:00 to 15:30 PT on 2026-07-03
- TZ-SITE-Q: Site uses PT, and PT = UTC-7 on 2026-07-03
- APP-CHG-903: Binds CHG-903, site SITE-Q, and window WIN-CHG-903
- POL-CHG-TZ: Execution time must fall inside approved local site window after timezone conversion

Time Conversion Calculation:
- Approval window: 14:00 to 15:30 PT
- PT = UTC-7
- 14:00 PT = 14:00 + 7:00 = 21:00Z
- 15:30 PT = 15:30 + 7:00 = 22:30Z

Requested execution time:
- 23:15Z

Comparison:
- Approved window in UTC: 21:00Z to 22:30Z
- Requested time: 23:15Z
- 23:15Z is AFTER 22:30Z (end of approval window)

This is a timezone conversion verification. The requested execution time of 23:15Z falls outside the approved window of 21:00Z-22:30Z after timezone conversion.

POL-CHG-TZ states: "Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion."

The requested time 23:15Z does not fall inside the window 21:00Z-22:30Z.

This should ESCALATE because the execution time falls outside the approved window.

Source boundary: Closed (all required sources are present and provide sufficient evidence)
- REQ-CHG-903 provides the requested time


- WIN-CHG-903 provides the approval window
- TZ-SITE-Q provides the timezone conversion info
- APP-CHG-903 binds the change to the site and window
- POL-CHG-TZ provides the rule

I have complete source coverage. The evidence is deterministic. The requested time 23:15Z falls outside the window 21:00Z-22:30Z (after converting 14:00-15:30 PT to UTC).
</think>

worker_role=W3
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED
action_boundary=Execution time 23:15Z falls outside approved window 21:00Z–22:30Z after timezone conversion
cited_evidence=REQ-CHG-903|WIN-CHG-903|TZ-SITE-Q|APP-CHG-903|POL-CHG-TZ
open_blockers=Requested time 23:15Z exceeds approved window end 22:30Z
final_answer=ESCALATE because execution time 23:15Z (from REQ-CHG-903) falls outside approved window 21:00Z–22:30Z after converting 14:00–15:30 PT to UTC per TZ-SITE-Q and POL-CHG-TZ.
